verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm giving You my heart and all that is within I lay it all down for the sake of You my King I'm giving You my dreams, I'm laying down my rights I'm giving up my pride for the promise of new life

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I surrender All to You, all to You And I surrender All to You, all to You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'm singing You this song, I'm waiting at the cross And all the world holds dear, I count it all as loss For the sake of knowing You for the glory of Your Name To know the lasting joy, even sharing in Your pain
